Table of Contents

Interface IPolyline2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that extend a polyline object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("7A5AE276-1230-11D4-9F72-00C04F6BDD7F")]
public interface IPolyline2 : IPolyline, IPolycurve, ICurve, IGeometry
